title: Health News Jun 29 — Osteopenia is silently weakening bones in mil
description: You're just one brittle bone away from a potentially life-altering fracture, and millions of people are living with this reality due to a condition known as osteopenia. It's a silent threat that's often overlooked, causing bones to become less dense and more fragile over time. The scary part is that many people only discover they have osteopenia after a fracture or a bone scan, which is why it's crucial to understand the risk factors. title: Health News Jun 29 — Osteopenia is silently weakening bones in mil
description: Breaking news in the world of health: millions of people are silently developing a condition that's weakening their bones, and it's not just about osteoporosis. Osteopenia is a common but often overlooked condition that causes bones to become less dense and more fragile, and because it develops silently, many people only discover they have it after a fracture or bone scan.
